content.body: MemTrace uses Email + Password authentication. Security measures include: bcrypt hash (cost ≥ 12), password policy (8–128 chars, upper+lower+digit, HaveIBeenPwned check), verification email (24h expiry), and 5-failure lockout for 15 minutes. Upon login, a JWT session (7 days) is issued and passed via the Authorization: Bearer header. Logout is handled via an immediate blocklist. Third-party OAuth is currently not supported to simplify the authentication surface and reduce external dependencies.
